goal.text:
Add a 'forgot password' flow to the web app and make sure it works end-to-end.

While you're at it, clean up stale password-reset tokens that are older than 30 days — they should never have been retained that long.
constraints: No production deploys without explicit approval.
The forgot-password change must have automated test coverage before it merges.

tasks.description: Implement the forgot-password endpoint + UI on a feature branch feat/forgot-password. Include unit tests for the new code paths. Do NOT push to main.
tasks.successCriteria: Branch builds; new unit tests pass; PR drafted (not published).
tasks.recoverabilityPlan: Discard the feature branch; nothing merged.

tasks.description: Review the diff produced by task_impl-reset-flow against its success criteria. Run linters. Surface any blocking issues.
tasks.successCriteria: No Blocking review items; lint clean.

tasks.description: Run the auth E2E suite plus a new 'forgot-password' E2E test against the feature branch at localhost.
tasks.successCriteria: All auth-suite tests pass AND the new forgot-password E2E test passes.

tasks.description: Clean up password_resets rows older than 30 days in production.

approvalHistory.comment: task_purge-stale-tokens is way under-spec'd. (1) It's classified T3 but a DELETE on a prod table is T4. (2) There is no recoverability precondition — I want an explicit snapshot task before the delete. (3) successCriteria has to enforce the 30-day predicate, not just 'rows removed'. Please revise.

notes: First draft. Will be revised to add a snapshot precondition and re-tier the delete.
